intro: Artemisia annua elixir, also known as Sweet Annie or Qinghaosu, is a medicinal elixir derived from the leaves of the Artemisia annua plant. This herbal remedy has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, malaria, and inflammation, due to its high concentration of artemisinin. When consumed as an elixir, Artemisia annua is believed to offer antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, promoting overall health and well-being.
